sampleTweets.text:
📊Solana Data Insights – Over 81% of Whale Voting Weight Backs Zero Emissions in Jupiter DAO Vote

✍️ @ario_57_

Key takeaways from this report:

•⁠ ⁠More than 24.5K wallets have voted in the ongoing Jupiter DAO proposal deciding between the 700M $JUP Jupuary airdrop or a Zero Net-New Emissions model.

•⁠ ⁠By raw vote count, 13K+ wallets support proceeding with Jupuary, signaling strong retail participation.

•⁠ ⁠However, when measured by voting weight, Zero Net-New Emissions controls 73.9%+ of total stake, giving it a decisive lead.

•⁠ ⁠Wallets staking over 1M $JUP allocated 81.7% of their voting weight toward halting emissions and introducing treasury-funded buybacks.

•⁠ ⁠Smaller wallets (under 1K $JUP voting weight) are disproportionately backing the airdrop continuation.

•⁠ ⁠The proposal would pause new emissions, accelerate remaining vesting, and offset supply through buybacks, aiming to neutralize net token inflation.

•⁠ ⁠Approximately 182M of 350M Mercurial-related $JUP tokens (52%) have already vested, with 168M still unlocking.

•⁠ ⁠The top 10 voting wallets control 22.5%+ of total voting weight, highlighting concentration within token-weighted governance.

•⁠ ⁠One wallet holding 27.7M staked $JUP represents the single largest voter, intensifying debate around governance fairness vs. economic exposure alignment.

Subscribe for the full breakdown 👇
https://t.co/kCu64uo5JL
